title: Work From Home Policy
description: Guidelines for remote work arrangements and WFH approval process
summary: Employees can avail up to 2 WFH days per month with prior approval. Must maintain regular working hours and be available for meetings.

title: Leave Policy
description: Complete guide to all types of leaves, eligibility, and application process
summary: Casual Leave: 15 days, Sick Leave: 10 days, Earned Leave: 15 days per year. Apply leaves minimum 3 days in advance except medical emergencies.

title: Code of Conduct
description: Professional behavior standards and ethical guidelines for all employees
summary: Maintain professional conduct, respect colleagues, avoid conflicts of interest, and uphold company values at all times.

title: Information Security Policy
description: Data protection, password management, and security protocols
summary: Use strong passwords, enable 2FA, don't share credentials, report security incidents immediately, and follow data handling guidelines.

title: Anti-Harassment Policy
description: Zero-tolerance policy for harassment and discrimination
summary: WorkZone maintains zero tolerance for any form of harassment or discrimination. Report incidents to HR immediately with confidentiality assured.

title: Dress Code Policy
description: Professional attire guidelines for office and client meetings
summary: Business casual attire for regular office days. Formal wear for client meetings. Casual Fridays allowed with smart casuals.

title: Performance Review Process
description: Annual and quarterly performance evaluation guidelines
summary: Quarterly check-ins and annual performance reviews. Self-assessment followed by manager review. Ratings impact increments and promotions.

title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
description: Guidelines for claiming business expenses and reimbursements
summary: Submit expense claims within 15 days with valid bills. Travel, meals, and client entertainment covered as per policy limits.

title: Health & Safety Policy
description: Workplace safety guidelines and emergency procedures
summary: Follow safety protocols, use ergonomic workstations, report hazards immediately. Emergency exits and assembly points clearly marked.

title: Learning & Development Policy
description: Training opportunities, certifications, and skill development programs
summary: ₹50,000 annual learning budget per employee. Company-sponsored certifications, conferences, and online courses. Mandatory 40 hours training annually.
